commands: docker exec reportafrica-api node -e "const { Client } = require('pg'); const c = new Client({ host: 'reportafrica-db.cng08osmae5x.eu-west-1.rds.amazonaws.com', port: 5432, database: 'reportafrica', user: 'reportafrica_admin', password: 'JesusisLord2026!', ssl: { rejectUnauthorized: false } }); c.connect().then(() => c.query(\"SELECT id, title, media FROM reports WHERE media::text LIKE '%url%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5\")).then(r => { console.log(JSON.stringify(r.rows, null, 2)); c.end(); }).catch(e => { console.log('ERROR:', e.message); c.end(); });"
